samples.xml_description:
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Triangle Wave signal generator.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">Output waveform signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="state_0">0</parameter>
        <parameter name="state_1">1</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[4:0]">wave</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[0:0]">state</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    <!-- Reset and state -->
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (~rst_n) begin
            state <= 1'b0;
        end
        else begin
            case (state)
                <!-- State 0: Increment -->
                1'b0: begin
                    state <= 1'b1;
                end
                <!-- State 1: Decrement -->
                1'b1: begin
                    state <= 1'b0;
                end
            endcase
        end
    end
    <!-- Waveform generation -->
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (~rst_n) begin
            wave <= 5'b0;
        end
        else begin
            case (state)
                1'b0: begin
                    if (wave != 5'd31) begin
                        wave <= wave + 1'b1;
                    end
                end
                1'b1: begin
                    if (wave != 5'd0) begin
                        wave <= wave - 1'b1;
                    end
                end
            endcase
        end
    end
    </implementation>
</module>
